recommendations.title: Child's Play 2
recommendations.overview: Chucky is reconstructed by a toy factory to dispel the negative publicity surrounding the doll, and tracks young Andy Barclay to a foster home where the chase begins again.

recommendations.title: Time Cut
recommendations.overview: A teen in 2024 accidentally time-travels to 2003, days before a masked killer murders her sister. Can she change the past without destroying the future?

recommendations.title: Child's Play
recommendations.overview: Karen, a single mother, gifts her son Andy a Buddi doll for his birthday, unaware of its more sinister nature. A contemporary re-imagining of the 1988 horror classic.

recommendations.title: Child's Play
recommendations.overview: After being shot in a toy store, a serial killer transfers his soul into a Good Guy doll. A mother then gifts it to her 6-year old son Andy, which unleashes terror upon the city.

recommendations.title: Even Lambs Have Teeth
recommendations.overview: Two young women terrorized by a group of small town psychos seek revenge on their tormentors.

recommendations.title: Finders Keepers
recommendations.overview: A haunted doll teaches one little girl why children shouldn't play with undead things.

recommendations.title: Toy Story 3
recommendations.overview: Woody, Buzz, and the rest of Andy's toys haven't been played with in years. With Andy about to go to college, the gang find themselves accidentally left at a nefarious day care center. The toys must band together to escape and return home to Andy.

recommendations.title: The Bad Seed
recommendations.overview: A widower suspects that his seemingly perfect adolescent daughter is a heartless killer.

recommendations.title: My Bloody Valentine
recommendations.overview: Twenty years after a Valentine's Day tragedy claimed the lives of five miners, Harry Warden returns for a vengeful massacre among teen sweethearts gearing up for another party.

recommendations.title: The Accursed
recommendations.overview: Hana spends twenty years suppressing a maleficent curse that was placed upon her bloodline, only to have a family member knowingly release it forcing her to kill or to be killed.
